title: Command Generation Lift-Out Criteria
goal: Implement #435 by adding explicit criteria for when the internal command-generation package is ready to be lifted out.
non_goals: Do not create an external repository.
Do not freeze the generator API prematurely.
Do not add a first-contact product surface.

intent.outcome: Maintainers can intentionally defer or approve extraction using a concrete checklist.
intent.constraints: Keep generic generator infrastructure separate from Agentic Workspace command truth and runtime primitives.
intent.latitude: Add checklist documentation and focused tests.
intent.escalation: Escalate if extraction criteria require behavior changes beyond documentation and guard tests.

execution.next_step: Archive, commit, push, close #435, refresh external evidence, then close #430 if all children remain closed.
execution.proof: focused tests, generated package checks, ruff, planning checks, and proof selector.

invariants: Agentic Workspace command facts stay workspace-owned.
Runtime primitives remain outside the generator.
Extraction stays intentionally deferred until criteria are met.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: #430 isolate generic command-generation machinery for future extraction

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: Extraction readiness can be reviewed deliberately instead of by inertia.
iterative_follow_through.next likely slice: close #430 parent if all children remain closed.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: Dogfood package surfaces, keep shipped package repo/tool/language agnostic, commit/push milestone, close issue only after proof.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: Exact checklist wording and guard-test placement.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: A change would create a new top-level surface or premature publication workflow.

immediate_next_action: Archive, commit, push, close #435, refresh external evidence, then close #430 if all children remain closed.

context_budget.live working set: command-generation README, focused contract-tooling tests, active planning record.
context_budget.externalize before shift: Archive this plan, close #435, refresh external evidence, then reconcile and close #430 if appropriate.
context_budget.pre-work memory pull: not needed; issue and package README contain the relevant facts
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Checklist expands into publication workflow, external repo creation, or new first-contact surface.

validation_commands: uv run ruff check src tests scripts packages/command-generation/src

uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed packages/command-generation/README.md tests/test_contract_tooling.py .agentic-workspace/planning/state.toml .agentic-workspace/planning/execplans/command-generation-lift-out-criteria.plan.json --format json
uv run ruff check src tests
uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section workflow_obligations --format json
uv run agentic-workspace report --target . --section closeout_trust --format json
completion_criteria: README includes a clear extraction-readiness checklist.
Checklist distinguishes generic generator infrastructure from Agentic Workspace command truth.
Checklist names migration path for imports, schemas, checks, and generated outputs.
Checklist names stability prerequisites before extraction.
Focused tests guard the criteria from being lost.

execution_run.handoff source: GitHub issue #435 plus agentic-workspace preflight, summary, report, proof, reconcile, and doctor surfaces
execution_run.what happened: Added a Lift-Out Readiness section to the command-generation package README and a focused guard test so extraction criteria remain visible and concrete.
execution_run.scope touched: packages/command-generation/README.md and tests/test_contract_tooling.py, plus planning closeout state.
execution_run.changed surfaces: Package README, contract tooling tests, active execplan, planning state.
execution_run.validations run: pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py, ruff, generated command package check, planning surface check, proof selector, pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py, planning doctor, preflight, summary, workflow obligations report, closeout trust report, reconcile.
execution_run.result for continuation: #435 is implemented and completes the final child slice of #430.
execution_run.next step: Archive this plan, commit, push, close #435, refresh evidence, then close #430 if no open children remain.

proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: pytest tests/test_contract_tooling.py, ruff, generated command package check, planning surface check, proof selector, pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py, planning doctor, preflight, summary, workflow obligations report, closeout trust report, reconcile.

finished_run_review.config compliance: package workflow was dogfooded through preflight, summary, report, proof, reconcile, and doctor surfaces
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: close #435 and then close #430 parent if refreshed evidence confirms all children are closed

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Make the package streamlined, lightweight, frictionless, cheap, modular, and small while preserving leverage.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: The bounded slice is complete; archive-plan --prepare-closeout generated normalized closeout fields.

closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded slice and larger intent are both complete.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: Prepared closeout records intent satisfaction, closure decision, proof evidence, and distillation buckets.
closure_check.reopen trigger: None unless new evidence shows the bounded closure was incomplete.

execution_summary.outcome delivered: Maintainers can now decide when the command-generation package is ready to lift out using explicit technical, ownership, migration, and stability criteria.
execution_summary.post-work posterity capture: archive this execplan and close the issue with validation evidence
execution_summary.knowledge promoted (memory/docs/config): README guardrail only; no Memory promotion needed

improvement_signal_review.friction: The closeout_trust report only treats used package surfaces as present after the execplan records them, so evidence must be updated before closeout.
improvement_signal_review.action: Handled in this slice by recording the used surfaces in execution_run; no new issue needed.

discard.summary: Command-by-command execution detail stays in the archived proof record.

memory.summary: README guardrail only; no Memory promotion needed

config_check.summary: README guardrail only; no Memory promotion needed
